summary: Dashboard error state displays correctly with proper mobile layout and beta messaging, but violates brand palette consistency by using neutral UI colors instead of the required diner aesthetic.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of required diner palette - should use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds and teal #9fd8d2 for primary canvas, not generic app chrome colors
Signed-in app chrome uses generic neutral palette that bleeds into public marketing visual system - authenticated surfaces should maintain visual separation with distinct but coherent brand treatment

actions: Apply diner palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces using cream card backgrounds and appropriate brand colors
Ensure visual coherence between public and authenticated surfaces while maintaining distinct contexts
Verify mobile drawer navigation remains functional with brand palette implementation
